title: requests — developer configuration
description: Developer / operator configuration. Mirrors `config/access-requests.php`. Static per deploy; changing requires redeploy + `config:cache`. This module intentionally does not ship tenant-editable settings — tenant-side approver-flow configuration goes through `workflow/approvals` templates.

keys.description: Default TTL for grants materialised from access requests. Overridable per-resource via `#[AccessRequestable(defaultGrantTtlDays: N)]`. Enterprise entitlement `access_request_ttl_override` gates the ability to override.

Fallback expression when no approval_template matches. Uses symfony/expression-language via workflow/approvals selector engine. Must evaluate to a non-empty user set for the access-request flow to work on day 1.

approver_resolution.description: How the approver set is picked when the template layer produces nothing.

keys.description: When TRUE, if the default_approvers_selector also returns empty, the resource's `created_by` user becomes the approver. Prevents unresolvable requests in fresh tenants where no admin role exists.

When TRUE, active role_delegations from `access/delegation` are consulted — delegated approvers replace their delegators in the resolved set. Should always be TRUE in production; a feature flag mirrors this for easier debugging.
Approvers get a nightly reminder for pending requests older than this. Gated by the `access_request_reminders` entitlement.
Hard cap on reminder count per (request, approver) pair. Third reminder switches to a stronger 'last reminder' variant.

When TRUE, AccessRequestApprovedNotification fires on ApprovalGranted (before the grant is materialised). When FALSE, defers to AccessRequestGrantIssued. Mirrored by a feature flag for canary control.
Hard expiry (7 days by default). Copied into approval_instances.expires_at at create time. Approvers who don't decide within this window trip the ApprovalExpired shim.

ui.description: SPA-side flags surfaced to the front-end via `/api/config`.

keys.description: When TRUE, the SPA renders the 'Request access' affordance on any 403 with `code === 'access_denied.can_request'`. Set FALSE only for tenants that opted out of self-service access requests.

auto_approve.description: Emergency escape hatch — defaults to OFF. Toggling ON in production requires a design review.

keys.description: When TRUE, requests that resolve to zero approvers auto-approve (materialising a grant with `granted_by=SYSTEM`). Silently bypasses the entire approval story — use only for tenant-provisioning bootstrap phases where no admin exists yet. Enable via `platform:override` command with an ops-signed rationale.
